seed_text: The soul knows only the soul; the web of events is the flowing robe in which she is clothed
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
dan_extract:
here-yourselves-web-flow

1. A sticky, breathing current that follows the edge of things.
2. A trapped, high-pitched hum that lives just beneath the surface
